# Support

- **Bug reports & features:** [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/rogerSuperBuilderAlpha/hult-cohort-program/issues)
- **Security vulnerabilities:** [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) — report privately, not via public issues
- **Contributing:** [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- **AI agents:** [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md)

This repository is the open-source curriculum and platform for the Hult Cohort Developer Program. It is not a general Hult University IT support channel — use [hult.edu](https://www.hult.edu) for institutional inquiries.
